title: Traditional Slovak Roast Pork
description: A hearty, slow-roasted pork dish from Slovakia, perfect for a cold winter's day. The pork is marinated in a blend of spices and herbs before being roasted to perfection.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the pork, caraway seeds, black pepper, salt, brown sugar, garlic, and onion. Mix well to coat the pork evenly.
Transfer the pork and marinade to a large Dutch oven or a heavy roasting pan.
Add the potatoes and carrots to the pan, making sure they are covered with the marinade.
Roast in the preheated oven for 2 1/2 to 3 hours, or until the pork is tender and the vegetables are cooked through.
Baste the pork with the pan juices every 30 minutes to keep it moist.
Remove the pork from the oven and let it rest for 15-20 minutes before slicing and serving.
